ddls:
CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "description_lang" TEXT /* Description of the achievement in the language of the game */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent achievement (if applicable) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount required to complete the achievement */,
  "operator" INTEGER /* Operator used to evaluate the achievement (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags indicating special properties of the achievement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was last updated */,
  "hidden" INTEGER /* Whether the achievement is hidden from players */,
  "repeatable" INTEGER /* Whether the achievement can be repeated */,
  "achievement_type" INTEGER /* Type of achievement (e.g., single, multi-criteria) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criteria */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement the criteria belongs to */,
  "order_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the order of the criteria within the achievement */,
  "criteria_type" INTEGER /* Type of criteria (e.g., item, location, event) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criteria was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criteria was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criteria the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_type" INTEGER /* Type of rule (e.g., amount, location, event) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value associated with the rule (e.g., amount, location name) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_rules_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_type" INTEGER /* Type of reward (e.g., item, currency, experience) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value associated with the reward (e.g., item name, currency amount) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement earned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" INTEGER /* Type of game (e.g., action, role-playing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_achievements" (
  "game_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the achievement belongs to */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game achievement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game achievement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "game_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_engine_integrations" (
  "game_engine_integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game engine integration */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_engine" TEXT /* Name of the game engine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game engine integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game engine integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_engine_integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_engine_integrations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
